name: io.github.layervai/qurl-mcp
title: qURL
description: Mint, resolve, audit, and rotate scope-limited expiring access links (qURLs) for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the qURL API with qurl:read, qurl:write, and/or qurl:resolve scopes. Obtain from https://layerv.ai.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: qURL API base URL. Defaults to https://api.layerv.ai. Override only for testing against a non-production qURL backend.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_CONNECTOR_URL
environmentVariables.description: Connector base URL used by local-file, file-data, and text-to-PDF upload tools before minting a qURL.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a shared qURL MCP config file. Both stdio and HTTP modes can read SMTP, connector, and default API settings from this file.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_MAX_UPLOAD_FILE_DATA_BYTES
environmentVariables.description: Maximum decoded/local upload size. Accepts bytes or units such as 10mb; capped at 100mb.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_SMTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: SMTP hostname for optional qURL link delivery.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_SMTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: SMTP port for optional qURL link delivery.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_SMTP_SECURE
environmentVariables.description: Whether SMTP uses an implicit TLS connection (true/false).

environmentVariables.name: QURL_SMTP_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: SMTP authentication password or app-specific credential.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_SMTP_FROM_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Validated sender email address for qURL delivery.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_SMTP_FROM_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Optional sender display name for qURL delivery.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_SMTP_MAX_RECIPIENTS_PER_MESSAGE
environmentVariables.description: Maximum recipients in one delivery request (default 10).

environmentVariables.name: QURL_SMTP_MAX_RECIPIENTS_PER_HOUR
environmentVariables.description: Maximum attempted recipients per qURL key per rolling hour (default 100).
